subject: fix(export): fix PDF quality and file size by using JPEG instead of PNG
body:
Root cause: jsPDF handles JPEG and PNG completely differently.
- JPEG: embedded directly as DCT_DECODE stream (no re-encoding)
- PNG: decoded to raw pixels (~23MB for 2160×2700), then re-compressed
  with deflate — producing files 5-10x larger than JPEG while being
  visually identical

Fix: Use JPEG at pixelRatio:2 with 0.92 quality. jsPDF wraps the JPEG
stream directly, giving sharp 2x rendering and small file sizes.
Transparency loss is irrelevant since PDF pages have white backgrounds.

Tags: export, pdf, quality, performance
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_012V7AguSge3Ngw25j72iiGX
title: fix PDF quality and file size by using JPEG instead of PNG
